summary: Workflow installs actionlint (line 22-28) but never runs it—dead code. Missing fixture files (.json) and test files referenced by workflow, preventing execution. Inconsistent Set-StrictMode: applied in 'Run Pester tests' but not in 'Run license checker' steps (lines 40-70). Script is well-structured with clear function separation; minor issues: parameter type inconsistency (bool vs switch for MockData), requirements.txt regex doesn't fully handle extras syntax [extra]==ver.
